fof-pwned-passwords.error: The password you chose is registered in the Pwned Passwords database, please choose a different one.

alert.warning: Your account's current password is registered in the Pwned Passwords database. We've sent a password reset email to you.

learnMoreUrl.label: "Learn More" link URL
learnMoreUrl.help: URL shown on the pwned password notice. Defaults to the Have I Been Pwned page. You can supply your own URL if you wish to write your own explainations about pwned passwords.
